summary: Fixed Git dubious ownership by adding network share path to global safe.directory. Verified local repo: origin configured, main synced with origin/main, push dry-run succeeds. Created scripts/setup-git-remote.ps1 for agent sessions missing origin. Noted screenshot's work branch scaffold (ff172e7) is not in this repo or GitHub - only existed in ephemeral agent environment.
current_status: Local Git fully operational on network share. Remote origin -> GitHub works. Repo still only has README/.gitignore on main; portfolio scaffold from failed push session was never persisted and needs recreation if desired.
